name: CrisPRO deliverable pipeline (evidence → manuscript → pitch → outreach)
what_it_solves: End-to-end pipeline that converts evidence receipts (MBD4/ATR + 9p21 audit) into downstream artefacts: manuscripts, pitch deck, AACR outreach.
how_it_solves: Directional flow: canonical_receipts → intelligence reports → manuscripts (v2→v4) → coin-toss positioning manuscript → Sanofi pitch directive → AACR tracker + session navigation.
why_it_exists: Prevents each deliverable from re-deriving evidence — every stage consumes the immediately-upstream artefact, not the raw data.
